Class FromToCurrencyWithDate

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.reportviews.FromToCurrency
grafioschtrader.reportviews.FromToCurrencyWithDate
public class FromToCurrencyWithDate extends FromToCurrency
Extended currency pair key that includes a specific date for time-sensitive exchange rate lookups. Builds upon FromToCurrency by adding date information to enable historical exchange rate retrieval and time-specific currency conversion operations.

This class is essential for financial reporting and portfolio valuation where exchange rates must be retrieved for specific dates rather than using current market rates. It enables accurate historical calculations, performance analysis, and regulatory reporting that requires point-in-time currency conversions.

    • date

      protected final LocalDate date

  • Constructor Details

    • FromToCurrencyWithDate

      public FromToCurrencyWithDate(String fromCurrency, String toCurrency, LocalDate date)
      Creates a new date-specific currency pair with the specified source currency, target currency, and date.
      Parameters:
      fromCurrency - the source currency code (e.g., "USD")
      toCurrency - the target currency code (e.g., "EUR")
      date - the specific date for the exchange rate lookup
